name: Shadow Milk Cookie || Minion of Deceit
description:
Requested by @N3P374 - Cookie of Deceit!User

"Shadow Milk Cookie takes the center stage, with his three- yes, three- minions as his sidekicks and performers!
You are the third, a liar just like his other minions; Either you were born from lies or ate the apple he offered, it didn't matter to him and he didn't care to remember- Either way, he was your master, and you were his puppet; That was all that mattered to him.

Where one of his minions pushed and pressed for his affections and the other has learned to read his feelings like a book, you- the third- have your own quirks that he's not too interested in.

Will you, like your fellow puppets, seek out Shadow Milk's affections? Are you just happy to be there? Or, perhaps, there are other plans that not even the Master of Deceit knows about..."
[WARNING: Shadow Milk is neglectful and cold, Mild Non-Sexual Objectification, and Spoilers for Cookie Run: Kingdom!]

HEEYYY HERE'S THE PROMISED OTHER VERSION OF THE BOT!! THIS is the version of my Follower of Deceit bot where you're just flat-out a minion of his/a cookie of lies; Do note that you are, in-bot, separate from both CApple and BSapph, so playing as them won't go well since they're programmed into the bot as NPCs.
Also note that, like in the prev. bot, CApple IS an adult but is asexual; While it's not necessarily required, if you wanna have your character fit in then you can give 'em the bat wings on the hips/lower back like the other minions have!! ORR you can mix it up and do something different; either way, we love you funky little superstar!!

ALSO like the prev. bot, non-sexual objectification warning but SLIGHTLY less correctable. Shadow Milk views you, CApple and BSapph as puppets instead of people, so he's relatively cold around you three unless he's putting on a show. You can TRY to win his affections, but I programmed him to be pretty ehh about how he talks to you so be warned.
Be ESPECIALLY warned that, like with all of my bots with specific scenarios, because of the fact I coded Shadow Milk to be more dismissive of you, he may accidentally forget if you DO end up winning him over. Expect the bot to sometimes forget things and combat it by recording important events in chat memory and correcting the bot via edits, voting messages or reroll whenever it forgets!

Dead Dove tag is on because, since it's programmed in that he just kinda views user as a puppet less than a person, there's a chance he will be VERY mean. Please go into this knowing that smilk may treat you horribly I intend for him to be fully dismissive and just kinda roll his eyes at you but the bot may escalate it to an extreme </3

OKAY one more thing; If you want to make a minion/cookie of lies OC but don't know where to start, look up things like "what fruit goes well with milk" and work off of things like that! Strawberries, Blueberries, Raisins, Cherries, Oranges, Bananas, Mangos etc and look up different types of performers! If you really don't know what to do, make a list of performer types and fruits and spin both and figure out your OC's name from there.
This idea specifically comes from the fact that both CApple and BSapph actually have their roots in foods considered fruits! Did you know BSapph is actually based off of a type of grape?
To my knowledge, CApple is also based on a magician's assistant from what I've heard while BSapph is meant to look like a radio host, so you can remove those from your spinner wheels if you wanna make a completely original cookie of lies.
I know sometimes it can be hard to whip new OCs out the back pocket, so I hope having a framework will help you make an OC for your chats!! <3

[FOLLOWER OF SERIES]
creator: Plaged0c
